description: LogicN project Claude Code settings — devtools hooks and standard toolchain

hooks.description: Before tests: rebuild the governed .wasm for any fusable package (one with package.lln.json) whose /src changed since its last build, so fused artifacts stay current (#175 fuse pipeline). Informational; always exits 0. Skip with LOGICN_SKIP_FUSE_REBUILD=1.

Full phase-close cadence at the end of every stage: core tests + devtools tests + security/naming audit sweep + provenance audit + full graph re-index. Always exits 0 (informational). Set LOGICN_SKIP_PHASE_CLOSE=1 to skip during rapid iteration. Benchmarks are intentionally NOT included (multi-minute) — run `npm run run` in logicn-devtools-benchmarks on demand.

devtools-added-2026-06-03: logicn-devtools-naming       — LLN-NAMING-001..005 naming standard enforcement (abbreviations, missing intent, generic types)
logicn-devtools-context      — Context Receipt generator: 51-97% token reduction for AI code windows
logicn-devtools-intelligence — BM25 hybrid code search: indexes .lln files, queries by semantic tokens + structural filters
logicn-devtools-provenance   — Data lineage tracker: maps source→transform→sink with trust boundary visualization
devtools-added-2026-06-05: logicn-devtools-package-graph — Per-package boundary governance: internal edges, external-dependency surface, orphan detection. Writes .graph/BOUNDARY.md inside each scanned package. `--check` = Hardened Border CI gate (fails on new external deps). Run: package-graph --scope <pkg>

logicn-ext-bridge-cpp        — First real implements InferenceBridge: BitNet ternary CPU/GPU bridges (MIT). Real hardware detection (AVX2/NEON kernel family + NVIDIA GPU via nvidia-smi). Native N-API addon is a documented seam; TPLSimulator is the deterministic fallback.

logicn-tower-citizen         — Unified Hybrid Inference Engine (Brain): TPL ternary VPP (BitNet-faithful I2_S), precision router (BitNet/NVFP4/Groq), InferenceBridge contract, governed Load/Execute/Erase lifecycle.
